CatalogManagementPlugin.title: Catalog Management
CatalogManagementPlugin.helpBody:
The Catalog Management menu provides tools to import and export satellite catalog data. Import tab: Load a .tce, .tle, or .txt catalog file via file picker or drag-and-drop. Export tab:
  • Export Official TLEs - Export real two line element sets.
  • Export 3LEs - Export three line element sets.
  • Export KeepTrack TLEs - Export all KeepTrack two line element sets including analysts.
  • Export KeepTrack 3LEs - Export all KeepTrack three line element sets including analysts.
  • Export Catalog CSV - Export catalog data as CSV.
  • Export STK .tce - Export TLE data in STK satellite database format.
  • Export Satellites in FOV - Export satellites currently in field of view.
  • Export .e Ephemeris - Export propagated ephemeris for selected satellite in STK format.
